note: GSE206528, GSE126005, and GSE146500 are named.
Donor IDs, ED subgroup, diabetes status, and tissue-source note are recorded.
Donor-level pseudobulk profiles are the discovery biological replicates.
Raw counts were retained for pseudobulk edgeR modeling.
Exploratory gene/cell filtering and minimum pseudobulk cell thresholds are reported.
Leiden r0.5 and marker-based major/refined mural labels are documented.
One profile per donor x major cell type or donor x refined mural subtype.
Formal testing required at least 50 cells per donor-compartment profile.
edgeR quasi-likelihood negative-binomial models with TMM normalization and robust empirical Bayes moderation.
No covariates were added because donor number and clinical metadata were limited.
BH FDR family is listed for every edgeR result table.
Diabetic-donor omission is explicitly marked as not runnable for the key contrast.
All ten possible 2-vs-3 labels among the five donor profiles are listed.
Normal, non-diabetic ED, and diabetic ED pericyte-like profiles are shown; ED2 is flagged below threshold.
